summary: Guardian recovery loop diagnostic: receipts are being written repeatedly but recovery requests continue. This indicates a systemic issue in receipt detection, not missing receipt generation.

deliverable.diagnostic: Repeated recovery requests for task_id=7de5806c8dbfc75c and task_id=d6bdee2bec011131 despite multiple receipts written.
deliverable.symptom: Guardian reports missing receipts even though recovery receipts exist.
deliverable.suggested_root_cause: Health monitor / Guardian not detecting written receipt files or expecting a different event format.
deliverable.note: This is a system diagnostic receipt to document the recurring failure mode.
